channel.title: Dungeons of Drakkenheim
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: Session 01 - The Royal Reveal
item.description:
Emberwood Village
Key Sites: The Red Lion Hotel, Buckledown Row and the Bark and Buzzard tavern.
The Black Hole Vision: Sable awakens deeply shaken from a nightmare: a black hole tearing the world apart.
The Academy Consultation: Sable brings the vision to Eldrick at his study. He identifies it not as a simple nightmare but as a potential localized planar singularity tied to the anomalous fluctuations at the heart of the Drakkenheim crater. He instructs her to report immediately if the visions begin occurring while she is awake, and in a telling slip, refers to her as a "viable subject."
The Dragon Prophecy: Krenzo shares his own vision: Arganoth, the Golden Wing set against a burning field, somehow tied to Lightbringer Santanael. Consulting Lightbringer Santanael directly, Krenzo learns that the Lightbringer's deep-city research has converged on The Pale Man: a horrific creator of mutated creatures who has been kidnapping children from the surrounding area.
The True Identity: The party connects the dots. The figure known publicly as Friedrich von Liechten and The Pale Man are one and the same. Lightbringer Santanael proposes a mutual intelligence-sharing pact going forward.
Seeking Faction Eyes: The party rides north of Emberwood Village to the secure encampment of the Hooded Lanterns. Clank secures an audience with Ansom Lang and his sister, Petra Lang. The party delivers a massive intelligence drop to the siblings: Queen Lenore is alive deep within the Haze.
Seeking Faction Eyes: The party rides north to the secure encampment of the Hooded Lanterns. Clank secures an audience with Ansom Lang and his sister Petra Lang, and the party delivers a staggering intelligence drop: Queen Lenore is alive, deep within the Haze, guarded by a contingent of specialized handmaidens. Her mind is fractured and contaminated by Delirium. The revelation visibly shakes both siblings and immediately raises the geopolitical stakes of the War of Succession.
The Missing Son: Before departing, Lily raises the matter of her missing son, Ash. Ansom Lang confirms that Ash is operating inside the city out of a base he calls the "Wolf Den."
The Buckledown Excursion: Lily and Sable spend an evening cutting loose on Buckledown Row, trading banter with Lorenzo and navigating the rowdy atmosphere of Queen's Men territory without incident.
The Information Game: At the tavern, Clank sits down with Blackjack Mel, leader of the Queen's Men, for a tense coded exchange. Blackjack Mel dangled information regarding Clank's older brother Soros, who is reportedly surviving on the outskirts of town with connections to the Followers of the Fallen Flame.
Druidic Experiments: Krenzo partners with Zoya to study the physiological effects of Delirium exposure in a controlled setting. Zoya mentions Moragon, a powerful reclusive druid who vanished into the Haze twenty-five years ago.
The Barroom Blitz: A brawl breaks out in the bar, featuring the unexpected entry of a squirrel known simply as Chitters.
The Looming Threat: As the month closes we learn that the Iron Accord is actively marching toward the region.
Sable notes a change in Clank's appearance: strange purple leaves sprouting through his shoulder plate.
Krenzo spends the month training under Zoya, while helping the people of Emberwood Village with farming and animal husbandry tasks.
Clank trains with Ansom Lang in the use of greatswords, swapping Shield Master for Great Weapon Master.
Lilly has gained proficiency in Performance after her night in Buckledown Row.
Ansom Lang and Petra Lang (Hooded Lanterns): Siblings and faction leaders who reacted with profound shock and heightened political urgency to the confirmation of Queen Lenore's corrupted survival.
Blackjack Mel (Queen's Men): Maintained total calculated poise during an information game, dangling knowledge of family lineages and missing siblings.
Aldor the Immense: A wealthy, bizarre, and highly magical merchant.
Zoya: Facilitated hazardous medical and environmental research into raw Delirium mutations.
Chitters: An unexpected martial threat who completely dominated a casual barroom brawl with explosive natural strikes.
Ash: Lilly's missing son who is currently scouting out near the northern "wolf pen" outpost.
Lorenzo, a charming goblin that Lilly seeks to woo.
**Main Thread: The Mad Sovereign
Status: Advanced. The Hooded Lanterns have been officially informed that Queen Lenore is alive but mentally contaminated deep within the Haze. A high-level audience with Lord Commander Elias Drexel is being arranged.
Faction Thread: Hunting The Pale Man
Status: Advanced. The party shared the true identity of Friedrich von Liechten with Lightbringer Santanael. The current objective is to locate his central stronghold and disrupt his flesh-crafting operations.
Personal Thread: Finding Ash
Status: Active. Received confirmation from the Lanterns that Lily Willowthorn's son is currently operating out of the northern Old Gods temple sector.
Personal Thread: Tracking Soros
Status: Active. Blackjack Mel confirmed that Soros is alive and hiding on the far outskirts of the city with unknown figures.
Regional Threat: Arrival of the Iron Accord
Status: New Hook. Heavy scouting reports indicate the imminent, dangerous arrival of the Iron Accord into the local territory.

item.title: Drakkenheim
item.description:
#lore #loc
What it all about

item.title: the Haze
item.description: #lore

item.title: Soros
item.description:
#npcA menacing warforged from a future version of Drakkenheim.
Clank, brother

item.title: Tracking Soros
item.description:
#quest
Clank is seeking the whereabouts of his brother, Soros.

item.title: The Mad Sovereign
item.description:
#quest
Queen Lenore has tasked Clank with finding and delivering the Inscrutable Staff to her.

item.title: Securing the Cosmological Clock Tower
item.description:
#quest
Eldrick has tasked us with securing the Cosmological Clocktower on behalf of the Amethyst Academy.
We reached the Cosmological Clocktower and defeated the Crimson Countess and her brood of harpies.

item.title: Hunting The Pale Man
item.description:
#quest
Believed to be working with Jenara and Jask, two figures from Krenzo's past, The Pale Man is believed to be performing horrific experiments on kidnapped victims.

item.title: Finding Moragon
item.description:
#quest
The missing druid Moragon may have the answers to Krenzo's questions.

item.title: Finding Ash
item.description:
#quest
The lone wolf Ash is believed to be in danger. Lily Willowthorn is trying to find her son.

item.title: Felched Follower
item.description:
#quest
The party has contracted Eldrick to kidnap Sable's brother, Caelin.
Sable and Caelin have met, and he has agreed to remain at the Amethyst Academy, for now.

item.title: Lily Willowthorn
item.description:
#pcScorned and surly.
Merry, daughter
Rowan, son
Ash, son
Tobin, husband

item.title: Eniad Clank
item.description:
#pcSent into the past by a future that is lost.
Soros, brother

item.title: Seals of Drakkenheim
item.description:
#lore
Finding these seals is required to put an end to the political unrest of Drakkenheim.
Lord Commander's Badge (Lord Commander Elias Drexel): A badge of office held by the leader of the Hooded Lanterns. It allows the bearer to control the formidable gargoyles and tower dragons guarding the city. Chancellor's Crest: A silver pin depicting a hand holding a golden quill as if writing on parchment.
Steward's Seal: A brooch shaped like two hands presenting the seal of Drakkenheim. Spymaster's Signet: A small, golden ring inlaid with magical, intricate runes.
High Flame Keeper's Amulet (High Flame Keeper Ophelia Reed): A small silver chest (phylactery) containing the ashes of Saint Vitruvio. Inscrutable Staff (Archmage of the Inscrutable Tower): Powerful arcane relic somewhere inside the Inscrutable Tower.

item.title: Queen's Men
item.description:
#lore
A loose but powerful confederation of bandits, outlaws, scoundrels, and deserters who rule the lawless underbelly of the ruins. They view Drakkenheim as a lawless goldmine and seek to exploit the chaos and trade Delirium for maximum personal wealth and power.
Blackjack Mel, boss true identity of the Queen is a mystery to us

item.title: Golden Order
item.description:
#lore
A region-spanning faction, offshoot of the Silver Order, focuses on the greater good over the particular events of Drakkenheim.
Kaelus Dawnstrider
Lightbringer Santanael

item.title: Emberwood Village
item.description:
#loc
Emberwood Village is a small village in Westemär, located about 5 miles to the south of Drakkenheim.
Despite the wars that took place after Drakkenheim fell, and not to mention the sheer danger of simply being in close proximity to Drakkenheim, Emberwood Village has stubbornly clung to existence. In recent years it has even achieved a slim measure of renewed prosperity by serving as the de facto trade and logistics hub for the various factions, private concerns, and many adventurers and mercenaries operating within the city.

item.title: Dran River
item.description:
#loc
A river running through Drakkenheim

item.title: Vorian
item.description:
#npc
The vampiric leader of the Crimson Fist. His days have been numbered ever since he killed Kaelus Dawnstrider.
Crimson Fist, leader

item.title: Krenzo
item.description:
#pc
formerly a druid of the Circle of the Old Ways.
now first of the Circle of Contamination.
Raza, wife
Chitters, nemesis
Shivers, old acquaintance
Tressa, friend
Selmar, friend

item.title: Silver Order
item.description:
#lore
A militant order of mostly paladins and clerics. Driven by strict religious zeal, they view Delirium as a catastrophic, corrupting plague against creation. Their ultimate goal is to completely purge the city, contain the Haze, and destroy every last shard of Delirium by fire to protect the rest of the world.

item.title: Followers of the Fallen Flame
item.description:
#lore
A radical sect that emerged after the meteor struck the city. They believe the Delirium meteor was not a disaster, but a holy herald of a cosmic prophecy. Led by Lucretia Mathias, they actively seek to commune with the cosmic elements, believing that embracing the corruption will enhance them.

item.title: Amethyst Academy
item.description:
#lore
An elite syndicate of mages who hold a monopoly on arcane education and practices. They view Delirium not as a curse, but as an incredibly powerful, revolutionary resource for spellcasting and magical advancement. They are willing to pay top coin to adventurers who can smuggle raw Delirium out of the Haze for their research.
Eldrick Runeweaver, leader
River, researcher

item.title: Aqua Expurgo
item.description:
#lore
Grants characters temporary immunity to the detrimental, mutating effects of the Haze that blankets the ruined city of Drakkenheim. Haze Immunity: It provides vital protection against the toxic, magical contamination that adventurers face when exploring the ruins. This allows characters to delve into heavily contaminated zones for an extended period without having to make Contamination saving throws. This effect lasts for 8 hours.

item.title: Red Lion Hotel
item.description:
#loc
A prominent, multi-story establishment in Emberwood Village that serves as a primary gathering place for travelers and mercenaries. Formerly a noble manor belonging to the village's local reeve before the meteor struck, it has since been converted into a bustling hotel and taproom. It provides a rare hot meal, a cold drink, and rentable rooms for those willing to pay a premium to rest between dangerous excursions into the Haze.

item.title: Cosmological Clocktower
item.description:
#loc
A towering structure, its uppermost level rises above the Haze.

item.title: Session 02 - The Cosmological Clocktower
item.description:
Emberwood Village
Key Sites: Cosmological Clocktower
The Summons: The party is called to Eldrick Runeweaver's study at the Red Lion Hotel. Lily, on a high perception roll, spots Tobin outside with his fiancée Serafina, accompanied by Rowan and Merry. She chooses not to engage and heads inside.
A Brother Delivered: Inside Eldrick's study, Sable finds and a bound, blindfolded, and gagged figure in the corner: Caelin, Sable's brother, extracted from the Followers of the Fallen Flame by the Amethyst Academy. The room is magically dimmed by Eldrick to conceal his identity and the Academy's involvement.
The Reunion: Sable removes Caelin's restraints. He is terrified. He reveals he had been living with the Followers of the Fallen Flame willingly; they fed him and accepted him in exchange for his prophetic abilities. After a tense emotional exchange, Caelin agrees to stay temporarily. River escorts him away through a conjured doorway, subtly casting a calming spell in the process.
Eldrick's Debrief: Eldrick considers the debt paid. He tasks the party with securing the upper floor of the Cosmological Clocktower as a safe haven above the Haze, and instructs Sable specifically to obtain one of the Seals of Drakkenheim.
The Skin Problem: Outside the hotel, Krenzo's skin is visibly cracking and flaking away, revealing raw, smooth, lime-green skin underneath. He visits Zoya to investigate.
Zoya's Findings: Zoya determines that the while researching the effects of Contamination, Krenzo has undergone a significant change within. Through the Force Evolution spell she triggers a fundamental change in Krenzo's biology; his cells now continuously reformat themselves, purging corruption and replacing old tissue. His connection to the gifts of Old Gods is severed. She has never seen anything like it and refers him to Moragon, the missing druid, for further answers.
The First of His Kind: Krenzo's shed body is left behind at Zoya's. He is confirmed as the first known member of the Circle of Contamination druid subclass.
Proceedings: Lily visits Temple at the bank. The encounter is briefly overshadowed by the unsettling presence of Malthus, a pale, tall, vacant-eyed man. Temple arranges the divorce mediation with Tobin for two days' time.
Dick Rejoins: The party reunites with Dick at the smithy. Ansom Lang confirms the meeting at the gate between Clank and Lord Commander Elias Drexel. Dick earned 200 gold in tips from playing during Clank and Krenzo's brawl. Malice suggests the party could escort Dick toward the Cosmological Clocktower.
Supplies: The party is near-broke heading into the city. The party each takes a dose of Aqua Expurgo before entering Drakkenheim.
Scaling the Walls: Rather than use the gate held by the Followers of the Fallen Flame, the party uses a wall-climbing gear to scale the 40-foot walls of Drakkenheim, while Clank consumes a scrill of Spider-Climb to do so.
Gargoyle Encounter: Three gargoyles activate on the ramparts. A short skirmish and rapid wall-descent follows. The party escapes by combining rope work, acrobatics, and Dick's bardic abilities to disorient the gargoyles. They hide in a partially collapsed building and take a short rest.
The Crater: Following the Dran River northeast toward the tower, the party catches a glimpse of something enormous moving in the deep haze near the crater; a shape larger than a building, lit by rhythmic lightning bursts.
The Market Square: The party reaches the market plaza before the Cosmological Clocktower and encounters approximately 12 members of the Followers of the Fallen Flame, including Balthazar. Dick attempts to bluff them with a false warning about incoming threats. The group moves together toward the tower with Balthazar remaining visibly suspicious.
The Attack: Members of the group begin being snatched from the air by an unseen aerial predator. The Followers of the Fallen Flame scatter. The party runs for the tower entrance.
The Ascent: The party enters the Cosmological Clocktower and begins climbing the exterior staircase, which is partially unstable. Clank is stowed in the Bag of Holding to bypass a dangerous stretch. Sable falls through a shattered step, dropping and taking damage.
Balthazar Burns: Below, Balthazar, having survived the aerial assault, turns on Sable and attacks her with holy magic as she falls.
The Crimson Countess: The predator reveals herself — a massive winged creature bursts through a stained glass window and enters the tower, hunting the party through the stairwell. After nearly dying, Krenzo identifies the bell chains in the belfry as a potential weapon and begins targeting them with thorn whips.
The Kill: Clank is pulled from the Bag of Holding by Dick mid-combat. He leaps out swinging, lands a hit on the Crimson Countess, and finishes her with a Divine Smite, the holy explosion destroying her. She falls, impaled on shattered glass below.
Krenzo undergoes a complete physical transformation, confirmed as the first member of the Circle of Contamination druid order. Referred to Moragon for answers.
Sable reunites with her brother Caelin, who agrees to stay temporarily. The relationship is fragile but open.
Lily initiates formal divorce proceedings against Tobin, who has arrived in Emberwood Village with fiancée Serafina.
Clank awaits the meeting with Lord Commander Elias Drexel.
All PCs level up after defeating the Crimson Countess.
Eldrick (Amethyst Academy): Delivered Caelin to Sable; considers the favour repaid; assigned the clock tower and Seals of Drakkenheim objectives.
Caelin: Reunited with Sable after being extracted from the Followers of the Fallen Flame; frightened but agreed to stay temporarily.
Zoya: Confirmed Krenzo's transformation; referred him to Moragon.
Ansom Lang (Hooded Lanterns): Arrangements confirmed for Elias Drexel to visit Emberwood Village.
Balthazar (Followers of the Fallen Flame): Present at the market square; suspicious of the party from the outset; attacked Sable during the tower assault.
Richard Cummings: Rejoined the party; earned 200 gold from the brawl gig; participated in the clock tower run.
Malice (Amethyst Academy): Briefly encountered at the smithy; facilitated Dick rejoining the group.
Faction Thread: Securing the Cosmological Clock Tower
Status: Advanced. Crimson Countess defeated. Top floor confirmed as a safe haven above the Haze. Tower requires repairs before full use; Amethyst Academy flagged as a potential party to handle this.
Faction Thread: Find a Seal of Drakkenheim
- Status: Advanced. Assigned by Eldrick Runeweaver specifically to Sable. Purpose not fully disclosed.
Personal Thread: Felched Follower
- Status: Advanced. Caelin extracted from the Followers of the Fallen Flame and reunited with Sable. Currently in Amethyst Academy care. Relationship status: cautious.
Personal Thread: Hell Hath No Fury
Status: New. Temple has scheduled mediation with Tobin in two days. Tobin is in Emberwood Village with Serafina.
Personal Thread: Finding Moragon
- Status: New Hook. Zoya referred Krenzo to Moragon in the north to understand his transformation. Not yet pursued.

item.title: Hell Hath No Fury
item.description:
#quest
Lily must find a way to legally separate from her husband, Tobin.

item.title: War of Succession
item.description: #lore

item.title: Raza
item.description:
#npcShe loved her mushroom garden.
Krenzo, husbanddeceased

item.title: Rowan Willowthorn
item.description:
#npc
Lily, mother
Merry, sister
Ash, brother
Tobin, father
Queen's Men, member

item.title: Caelin
item.description:
#npc
At the behest of Sable and the rest of the party, the Amethyst Academy kidnapped him to meet with Sable.
Sable, sister
Followers of the Fallen Flame, former member

item.title: Find the Bagpipes
item.description:
#quest
Dick's pipes are stuck somewhere in the Cosmological Clocktower.

item.title: Richard Cummings
item.description: #pcPlaceholder picture lol

item.title: Dickph
Sable Emberlin
item.description:
#pc
former member of the Iron Accord
Caelin, brother
Kavira, adoptive mother

item.title: Krenzo
Sable
Lily
Clank
Ms. Charlotte
item.description:
#npc
Froze the Black Ivory Inn in a time loop.

item.title: Black Ivory Inn
item.description:
#locAn unusual tavern stuck in a time loop, reliving the last moments of peace before the meteor fell. The more people eat, the more entranced they become until they can't leave the inn.
This time loop was created by Ms. Charlotte, a bard who continued to hold everybody captive to hear her music for decades. We discovered how to wound her and ended up breaking her spell when we destroyed her phylactery and shattered her protection.

item.title: Garmyr
item.description:
#loreDelerium-infested creatures living in the inner cirty. Deadly in numbers.
Lord of the Feast, leader

item.title: Lord of the Feast
item.description:
#npc
the fearsome leader of the Garmyr

item.title: Crimson Fist
item.description:
#loreA secretive order of vampiric monks.
Vorian, member

item.title: Mamba Jones
item.description:
#npcBaddie. Powerful combatant full of dirty tricks.
Krenzo, (she wishes)

item.title: Regionald
item.description: #npcA gryff (hippo person). Seemingly cool dude.

item.title: Plutoi Jackson
item.description: #npcMercenary, ranger, helpful on long journeys into the city.

item.title: Jenara
item.description:
#npc
Disgraced druid and alchemist, continuing her studies in Drakkenheim
Krenzo, nemesis

item.title: Tressa
item.description:
#npcOld friend of Krenzo. Well-travelled and fits in anywhere.
Krenzo, friend

item.title: Karen Albrecht
item.description:
#npc
Owner of the Bark and Buzzard

item.title: Oscar Yoren
item.description:
#npc
A disgraced mage, left the safety of Emberwood Village to continue his studies inside the Outer City. He is an accomplished alchemist.
Amethyst Academy, former member

item.title: Outer City
item.description: #loc

item.title: Fate Hope
item.description:
#npc
Rescued from the Black Ivory Innkind of heartless

item.title: Champion's Gate
item.description: #loc

item.title: Malikas
item.description:
#npc
Helped us when we approached the Champion's Gate
Amethyst Academy, member

item.title: Osiris
item.description:
#npc
Rescued from the Black Ivory Inn.
Amethyst Academy, member

item.title: Aaron Grint
item.description:
#npc
We resuced him from the Black Ivory Inn, but he died to a Garmir ambush on the way back to Emberwood Village
Hooded Lanterns, memberDeceased

item.title: Annika Patel
item.description:
#npc
We rescued her from the Black Ivory Inn
Silver Order, member

item.title: Cassandra Wyatt
item.description:
#npcKnight Lieutenant of the Order.
Silver Order, memberrides a griffon

item.title: Ophelia Reed
item.description:
#npc
Leader of the Silver Order
Silver Order, leader

item.title: Flamekeeper Hannah
item.description:
#npc
A healer of the Silver Order
Silver Order, member

item.title: Lucretia Mathias
item.description:
#npcProphesized the meteor, now leads the Followers
Followers of the Fallen Flame, leader

item.title: Nathaniel Flint
item.description:
#npcA higher-ranking official of the Followers.
Followers of the Fallen Flame, member

item.title: Arrival of the Iron Accord
item.description: #quest

item.title: Crimson Countess
item.description: #npcEpic foe of Drakkenheim

item.title: Balthazar
item.description:
#npc
A member of the followers, we rescured him from the Black Ivory Inn's time loop.
Followers of the Fallen Flame, member
Attacked us at the Cosmological Clocktower

item.title: Aqua Expurgio
item.description: #lore

item.title: Malice
item.description: #npcA Tiefling warlock-has fucked everyone

item.title: Temple
item.description:
#npc
A notary, retained by Lily.

item.title: Serafina
item.description:
#npc #HalflingA herbalist, manipulative, young
Tobin, fiance

item.title: Malthus
item.description: #npcMysterious head of the Obsidian Bank

item.description:
#npc
Lily, mother
Ash, brother
Rowan, brother
Tobin, father

Lily, mother
Rowan, brother
Merry, sister

item.title: Tobin
item.description:
#npc
Lily, wife
Rowan, son
Merry, daughter
Ash, son

item.title: Caelan
item.description:
#npc
At the behest of Sable and the rest of the party, the Amethyst Academy kidnapped Caelan to meet with Sable.
Sable, sister
Followers of the Fallen Flame, former member

item.title: Circle of Contamination
item.description: #lore

item.title: Circle of the Old Ways
item.description: #lore

item.title: Eldrick Runeweaver
item.description:
#npc
Amethyst Academy, leader

item.title: River
item.description:
#npcBlunt, with a dry sense of humor
Amethyst Academy, member

item.title: Buckledown Row
item.description: #loc

item.title: Jask
item.description:
#npcA goblin kidnapper.
Krenzo, enemy

item.title: Lorenzo
item.description:
#npc
A suave goblin who is less handsome than Krenzo
Shivers, friend

item.title: Sir Augustus
item.description:
#npcA nice frog man.
Merry, fiance

item.title: Arganoth, the Golden Wing
item.description:
#npcA golden dragon.
Lightbringer Santanael, unknown

item.title: Hooded Lanterns
item.description:
#lore
The remnants of the city's old military guard and royal watch, led by Elias Drexel. Operating out of the old garrison and city gates, they are a lawful, disciplined faction dedicated to restoring order, rebuilding the city, clearing out monsters, and placing a rightful heir back onto the throne of Westemar.

item.title: Aldor the Immense
item.description:
#npc
A purveyor of magical goods, situated in Emberwood Village

item.title: Friedrich von Liechten
item.description:
#npc
He is The Pale Man

item.title: Caul 'Shivers'
item.description:
#npcFrom the northern reaches of the continent
Krenzo, acquaintance

item.title: Kavira
item.description:
#npc
Iron Accord, leader
Sable Emberlin, daughter

item.title: Iron Accord
item.description:
#loreA mercenary group, known for their effective and ruthless nature.
Kavira, leader
Sable Emberlin, former member
Nikomai, member

item.title: Blackjack Mel
item.description:
#npc
Leads a gang of the Queen's Men

item.title: Chitters
item.description:
#npcAn unnatural squirrel who moves like lightning
nemesis of Krenzo

item.title: Moragon
item.description:
#npc
A missing druid, located somewhere in the Inner City
Zoya, acquaintance

item.title: Inner City
item.description: #loc

item.title: Delirium
item.description: #lore

item.title: Zoya
item.description:
#npc
An old druid living on the outskirts of Emberwood Village
Krenzo, student

item.title: Queen Lenore
item.description: #npc

item.title: Petra Lang
item.description:
#npc
Hooded Lanterns

item.title: Ansom Lang
item.description:
#npc
Hooded Lanterns

item.title: The Pale Man
item.description:
#npc
Jask, a person from Krenzo's past

item.title: Elias Drexel
item.description:
#npc
Lord-Commander of the Hooded Lanterns

item.title: Lightbringer Santanael
item.description:
#npc
A paladin of the Golden Order. Suave and secretive. Saved our butts.
Acquaintance of Kaelus Dawnstrider

item.title: Kaelus Dawnstrider
item.description:
#npc
A paladin of the Golden Order. He was a great man who sacrificed his life so that we could make it to the city.

item.title: Selmar
item.description:
#npcAn accomplished bounty hunter. He is an elf.
friend of Krenzo

item.title: Bark and Buzzard
item.description: #locA small, one-level public house nestled quietly among the residential cottages of Emberwood Village. Known as a much more laid-back, peaceful, and localized alternative to the high-traffic chaos of the Red Lion Hotel, it is a favored spot for quiet drinking, low-profile information trading, and local brawls when tensions between rival adventurers inevitably boil over.

item.title: The Obsidian Bank
item.description: #loc

item.title: Lilly Willowthorn
item.description:
#pc
Merry, daughter
Rowan, son
Ash, son
Tobin, husband

item.title: Followers of the Fallen Fire
item.description: #loreA radical religious sect that emerged after the meteor struck the city. They believe the Delirium meteor was not a disaster, but a holy herald of a cosmic prophecy. Led by Lucretia Mathias, they actively seek to commune with the cosmic elements, believing that embracing the corruption and taking "the Sacrament" will prepare them for a coming world-ending war.
